description: Connects to a PostgreSQL database and exposes schema inspection and safe SELECT query execution as MCP tools and resources for use with Claude Desktop or any MCP-compatible client.

name: MCP Access OAuth
description: A remote MCP server with built-in OAuth authentication via Cloudflare Access, providing tools like add and generateImage with user-based access control.

name: comfy-mcp
description: MCP server that enables AI agents to control a local ComfyUI instance for image generation, allowing workflow understanding, parameter modification, execution, and model discovery.

name: CareSakhi MCP Server
description: Manages orders, products, stock, users, and EcoCoins for the CareSakhi Partner App via natural conversation with Claude Desktop.

name: PyContextify
description: Semantic search server with relationship-aware discovery across codebases and documents.

name: figma-console-mcp
description: A Model Context Protocol server that bridges design and development by giving AI assistants complete access to Figma for extraction, creation, debugging, and bidirectional token sync.

name: bitbucket-mcp
description: MCP server for Bitbucket Cloud that enables listing repositories, managing pull requests, posting comments, and handling tasks via natural language.

name: Cogniz Memory Platform MCP Server
description: Official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Cogniz Memory Platform. Enables AI assistants like Claude to store and retrieve memories across conversations.

name: MCP Apartments
description: Enables AI agents to search, compare, and interact with Apartments.com rental listings, including scheduling tours and contacting property managers.

name: chuk-mcp-code-raptor
description: Deep code intelligence for MCP — an MCP server that gives AI agents semantic understanding of codebases via RAPTOR hierarchical indexing and code property graphs.
